decisions.title: Sunset Explore 1 by March 31 (GA deadline)
decisions.context: Multiple ENG tickets (9549, 9550, 9551, 8140) signal coordinated Explore 1 deprecation. Explore V2 is a core 'Nail the Core' product. Migration link, banner, pathname changes, and full sunset in progress. March 31 Amplitude event rename deadline aligns with GA.

arguments.for: Clear migration path defined, user communication via banners/intercepts in place, aligns with Explore V2 GA target, reduces maintenance burden, focuses resources on core product
arguments.against: 8-day window is tight, potential user disruption if migration issues arise, Amplitude event rename (ENG-9276) must complete before GA or analytics break

decisions.title: Prioritize Channel List V2 completion over feature expansion
decisions.context: Cluster of tickets (9077, 9115, 9116, 8960, 9412) around Channel List v2 performance and UX. CPU issues investigated, pinned elements, drag-to-plot, refresh bugs being fixed. Core Explore V2 navigation component impacts 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' if users can't efficiently find data.

arguments.for: Foundational UX component, performance issues directly reduce usability, blocking user workflows, must be solid before GA
arguments.against: Delays other features like log scaling (9492) or calculated channel inputs (9552), may extend GA timeline if critical path

decisions.title: Adopt Claude code review GitHub Action org-wide
decisions.context: ENG-8925 adds Claude code review automation. Signal>Evidence>Decision strategy emphasizes tooling that surfaces insights faster. Could improve code quality, onboarding, and decision velocity across all products (Explore, Canvas, Python Rules, Sift Edge, Ask SIFT).
decisions.blockedBy: Need cost/benefit analysis, security review for LLM in CI/CD, pilot results from initial implementation

arguments.for: Accelerates review cycles, catches issues earlier, educates juniors, aligns with AI-augmented workflows, scales code quality as team grows
arguments.against: Adds CI/CD cost, potential false positives create noise, security/IP concerns with code sent to Claude, requires prompt tuning and maintenance

decisions.title: Resolve AWS SSO/Keycloak circular dependency before Q2
decisions.context: ENG-9547 flags circular dependency between AWS SSO and Keycloak. ENG-9543 documents break-glass credentials. Infrastructure fragility risks all products. 'Build the Moat' pillar requires operational excellence.

arguments.for: Eliminates single point of failure, improves disaster recovery, simplifies onboarding/offboarding, reduces ops burden, enables Google SSO migration
arguments.against: Complex migration touching auth across all services, potential downtime risk, requires coordination with security/IT, diverts eng resources from product work

decisions.title: Deprecate Multipanel by end of Q2
decisions.context: ENG-7082 adds deprecation banner to Multipanel. Likely superseded by Explore V2 or Canvas. 'Nail the Core' means pruning non-core features that dilute focus and create maintenance drag.

arguments.for: Reduces code surface area, focuses user education on core products, frees eng capacity, simplifies product portfolio
arguments.against: May have power users dependent on it, requires migration path documentation, could create short-term support burden

keyResults.name: Python Rules in production at 5 customers

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy load with Explore V2 GA push - daily standups, unblock sessions, and vendor calls consuming 80% of week. Only 8 free hours for strategic work.
alerts: Zero maker time on Tuesday/Thursday - back-to-back meetings

No focus blocks >2 hours this week - risk of shallow work only
